feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Electron localization, charge redistribution, and emergence of topological states at graphite junctions
entry.content:
Authors: L Soneji, S Crampin, M Mucha-Kruczynski -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.11515, 2026

Abstract: Low-energy electronic behavior in graphite crystals is highly dependent on the relative stacking arrangement of the constituent layers. Topologically non-trivial electronic states can arise due to interrupted rhombohedral (ABC) stacking ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of the unexpected charge-density-wave phase driven by artificial gauge field in three-leg Bose-Hubbard ladder
entry.content:
Authors: T Yokoyama, Y Tada -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.11169, 2026

Abstract: We investigate hard-core bosons at half filling on a three-leg ladder under the uniform artificial gauge field. By analyzing current patterns and correlation functions, we uncover a rich quantum phase diagram containing multiple superfluid and ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Isomorphic Functionalities between Ant Colony and Ensemble Learning: Part III--Gradient Descent, Neural Plasticity, and the Emergence of Deep Intelligence
entry.content:
Authors: E FokouĂŠ, G Babbitt, Y Levental -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.09677, 2026

Abstract: In Parts I and II of this series, we established isomorphisms between ant colony decision-making and two major families of ensemble learning: random forests (parallel, variance reduction) and boosting (sequential, bias reduction). Here we complete the ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Modelling the Diachronic Emergence of Phoneme Frequency Distributions
entry.content:
Authors: F Moscoso del Prado Martín, S Salhan -arXive-prints, 2026

Abstract: Phoneme frequency distributions exhibit robust statistical regularities across languages, including exponential-tailed rank-frequency patterns and a negative relationship between phonemic inventory size and the relative entropy of the ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Dissipative Hamilton Jacobi Dynamics and the Emergence of Quantum Wave Mechanics
entry.content:
Authors: N Jubert Matjelo -arXive-prints, 2026

Abstract: We develop a dissipative extension of classical mechanics based on a complex, and more generally quaternionic, action principle that endows every classical system with an intrinsic environment. Decomposing the action into conservative and ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Early emergence of ultimate-like transport in two-dimensional turbulent thermomagnetic convection
entry.content:
Authors: P Capobianchi -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.09507, 2026

Abstract: Scaling laws for turbulent thermomagnetic convection of a high-Pr fluid in a square cavity are obtained through direct numerical simulations and formulated via theoretical arguments informed by the numerical data. A regime consistent with an ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Complex Structures
entry.content:
Authors: FS Kitaura -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.11481, 2026

Abstract: Complex structures often emerge from initially homogeneous or weakly correlated states. We address the apparent tension between this ordering and entropy growth through a unified framework combining semi-microscopic phase-space dynamics ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Stereotypes and Affective Polarization from Belief Network Dynamics
entry.content:
Authors: OC Seckin, R Aiyappa, M Vlasceanu, F Menczer... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: ... We show that group identity can drive the emergence of shared individual preferences around initially unaligned concepts— providing a pathway ... Our work provides a cognitively grounded perspective on the emergence of consensus and ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Comment on" On the emergence of preferred structures in quantum theory" by Soulas, Franzmann, and Di Biagio
entry.content:
Authors: O Cristinel Stoica -arXive-prints, 2026

Abstract: ... impossibility of emergence of preferred structures from the Hamiltonian $\mathsf{H}$ and the unit vector $|ψ\rangle$ only. The obstructions to emergence are illustrated on the concrete construction of a tensor product structure (TPS) from Soulas et al ...
